mapper.sql: select p.patient_id, p.patient_no, p.patient_name, p.gender, case p.gender when '0' then '男' when '1' then '女' else '未知' end as gender_label, concat(left(ifnull(p.id_card_no, ''), 6), '********', right(ifnull(p.id_card_no, ''), 4)) as id_card_no, concat(left(ifnull(p.phone_no, ''), 3), '****', right(ifnull(p.phone_no, ''), 4)) as phone_no, p.birthday, p.dept_id, p.dept_name, p.attending_doctor_id, p.attending_doctor_name, p.inpatient_no, p.patient_status, case p.patient_status when 'active' then '在院' when 'observation' then '留观' when 'discharged' then '已出院' else p.patient_status end as patient_status_label, p.admission_time, p.discharge_time, p.remark, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, (select count(1) from oa_patient_case pc where pc.patient_id = p.patient_id) as case_count from oa_patient p

select c.case_id, c.patient_id, p.patient_no, p.patient_name, c.case_no, c.case_title, c.visit_type, case c.visit_type when 'outpatient' then '门诊' when 'inpatient' then '住院' when 'emergency' then '急诊' else c.visit_type end as visit_type_label, c.case_status, case c.case_status when 'active' then '进行中' when 'review' then '复诊跟踪' when 'closed' then '已结案' else c.case_status end as case_status_label, c.diagnosis, c.chief_complaint, c.treatment_plan, c.doctor_id, c.doctor_name, c.dept_id, c.dept_name, c.visit_time, c.discharge_time, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time from oa_patient_case c left join oa_patient p on c.patient_id = p.patient_id
mapper.select: select distinct dept_id, dept_name from oa_patient where dept_id is not null and dept_name is not null and dept_name != '' order by dept_id asc
